title: Tetrion Easy On Filler Sack 5kg – High-Performance, Fast-Drying Interior Filler for Smooth, Durable, and Easy-to-Apply Wall & Surface Repairs
features: SUPER SMOOTH FINISH: Revolutionary vacuum process gives an air hole and pinhole-free, super smooth finish
Unique Dual Action, uses chemical setting to quickly cure filler within the hole and traditional air drying on the surface
Brilliant white finish, over-paintable, very easy to sand and super smooth to apply
Fills much deeper gaps due to its chemical curing shrink resistant technology; easy to mix and apply, for use on plaster, wood, stone, and masonry
INDIVIDUAL POUCHES: This filling compound comes in individual 500g bags which is great for reducing the amount of waste on smaller jobs
description: Product Description The Tetrion brand is one of the most recognisable names within the professional trade market over the last 40+ years. At its launch in the early 1970’s Tetrion changed the filler market with the innovation of the first ‘All Purpose Filler’. With Fillers, Adhesives, Decorating Sundries, and much more, Tetrion covers every aspect of modern household decorating, attracting new tradespeople and DIY enthusiasts with its reputation as one of, if not the best homecare range on the market. Tetrion Easy-On Joint & Filler Compound 5Kg Tetrion Easy-On is a high quality and high performance interior filler especially designed to help make plaster filling and jointing jobs as easy as possible. Features 'Dual-Action' air-drying and chemical setting characteristics allowing for deep fill applications whilst maintaining a super-smooth finish Polymer re-enforced, easy mixing powder For use in a variety of household materials including plaster, wood, stone, brickworks, and many other building materials Consistent setting time, working life of 1 hour Rapid sanding to feather edge Over-paintable Fast drying. non-sagging formula Contains 10x 500g sealed job bags to minimise wastage High quality, high performance filler designed to make fast work of plaster filling and jointing jobs Brilliant white finish, extremely easy to sand and super smooth to apply Unique Dual Action, uses chemical setting to quickly cure filler within the hole and traditional air drying on the surface. Much deeper gaps can be filled due to its chemical curing technology Versatile with many uses around the house including filling cracks, decayed wood, holes and much more Tetrion Easy-On is a high quality and high performance interior filler especially designed to help make plaster filling and jointing jobs as easy as possible. The ideal compound for use in projects which involves filling joints, gaps, and holes in many household materials including plaster, wood, stone, brickworks, and many other building materials. The special 'Dual-Action' formulation has air-drying and chemical setting characteristics that allow for a deeper fill whilst maintaining a super-smooth surface without the need for a separate 'finishing' filler. Directions for use: 1. Ensure all surfaces are clean, dry and free from loose materials 2. Add 2 parts Tetrion Easy-On Filler to 1 part water. Mix thoroughly to form a smooth paste 3. Apply with a filling knife or float and smooth off with a wet blade 4. Working life is approximately 60 minutes and setting occurs after approximately 140 minutes depending on atmospheric conditions 5. Due to Easy-On's special Dual-Action curing properties the filler can be applied into deeper cracks without the need to build up layers as with traditional 'air dried' powder fillers Advice: Use within 6 months of purchase.
